title: tropilis kingiana
intro_study: According to "Phytochemistry", Tropilis kingiana benefits include its extracts and pure compounds having been reported for their antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, cytotoxic, antidiabetes, antioxidant, antidiarrheal, and antiprotozoal activities.
side_effects: Tropilis kingiana can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, due to its high concentration of tropine alkaloids. Prolonged use or excessive consumption can also lead to headaches, dizziness, and fatigue. In severe cases, improper use of Tropilis kingiana may result in more serious side effects, such as liver damage and respiratory problems. Furthermore, individuals with pre-existing medical conditions, particularly those with liver or kidney disease, should exercise extreme caution when using Tropilis kingiana or consult a healthcare professional for guidance.
